Transcrição Completa: 17 I Didn't Expect it to Cost This Much
[00:00] I didn't expect it to cost that much.
[00:03] I bet you won't expect it to make as much as it does for you either then.
[00:08] I didn't expect it to cost that much.
[00:11] I want to be clear, this objection usually comes up either at the very beginning of the sale because you do what I mentioned and you bring up price. We're literally at the top of the conversation.
[00:21] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

TEXTO: "Early Price Disclosure Strategy"
NÚMEROS: 10 minutes of perspective
VISUAL: Timeline de chamada de vendas mostrando preço no início vs no final, estratégia de disclosure antecipado
[00:23] So, ideally, you're talking to them about this like right at the top of the sales call. Okay?
[00:28] So, if that happens, I didn't expect it to cost this much.
[00:32] Well, I'd encourage that you sit around here. Let me give you about 10 minutes of perspective on why it costs that much to justify that it's not actually that expensive.
[00:41] It's all relative to what you're going to make off this. That's why we charge what we do.
[00:46] We are great at getting people results and typically making far more than what you're about to put up in upfront capital to get this started.
[00:54] Hear me out for the next 10 minutes. Is that fair?
[00:58] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Late Price Disclosure Problem"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Problema de revelar preço no final, necessidade de reiteração, razão para liderar com preço
[01:00] You know, and like I said, you should be getting this at the beginning. If you're one of those sales people that is leaving the price for the very end, oh, I didn't expect it to cost that much.
[01:09] You're going to essentially have to do what I articulated anyway. you're going to have to reiterate why it costs as much as it does, which is essentially why we always lead with price in the first place.
[01:19] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Value Justification Response"
NÚMEROS: 10 minutes explanation time
VISUAL: Justificativa de valor baseada em retorno, explicação de custo vs benefício, apresentação de resultados médios
[01:21] Anyway, one of my favorites though, I didn't expect it to cost that much.
[01:26] Well, it costs what it costs because we make people a lot more than that.
[01:31] I'd love to go over the details with you about why it costs that much and how much we make people on average.
[01:37] Hear me out for the next 10 minutes. I'll walk you through.
